requirements.summary: Create a full-page iframe embedding the Revelation Walls gallery
acceptanceCriteria: The iframe src is set to https://t3knologic.github.io/revelation-walls-gallery/
The iframe fills the full viewport width and height with no visible scrollbars on the outer page
The iframe has no border or padding around it

file_operations.description: Replace the existing App content with a full-viewport iframe component that embeds https://t3knologic.github.io/revelation-walls-gallery/. The iframe must fill 100% of the available viewport space with no border, padding, or margin. Set appropriate sandbox and allow attributes for third-party iframe embedding.

requirements.summary: Add a minimal branded header or footer bar with attribution text
acceptanceCriteria: A slim bar is visible that credits the mural project, commissioner, artist, and app builder
The bar does not overlap or cover the iframe gallery content

file_operations.description: Create a minimal branded bar component that displays 'Revelation Walls – Murals & NFTs at the Dfinity Foundation | Commissioned by Dominic Williams | Painted by Candace Marquette | Built by T3kNo-Logic.xyz'. This component should be a slim, non-intrusive bar with typography optimized for readability against a dark background. Include the generated banner image frontend/public/assets/generated/revelation-walls-banner.dim_1200x120.png as a background or inline image to enhance the branding.

Wire the BrandedBar component into the App layout. Position it as a fixed header or footer so it does not obscure the iframe gallery content. Adjust the iframe layout to account for the bar's height, ensuring the iframe fills the remaining viewport space.

requirements.summary: Apply a bold, gallery-focused visual theme with dark background and warm accent colors
acceptanceCriteria: The page background and branded bar use a dark color palette with warm accent colors
Typography is bold and legible against the dark background
The visual style feels cohesive with a mural/art gallery aesthetic

file_operations.description: Update the global stylesheet to apply a dark background (deep black or charcoal) and warm accent colors (golds, amber, bronze). Define bold typography styles with strong hierarchy for headings and body text that are legible against dark backgrounds. Ensure these styles create a cohesive mural/art gallery aesthetic.

Extend the Tailwind theme with custom color variables for the gallery-focused palette: dark background tones (deep blacks), warm accent colors (golds, rich ambers), and any additional mural-inspired accent tones. Configure typography settings to enforce bold font weights and strong hierarchy.

Apply the gallery-focused theme to the BrandedBar component using the custom Tailwind utilities and global styles. Ensure the bar uses dark background colors, warm accent highlights, and bold legible typography consistent with the mural aesthetic.
